name: Multi-Tier Stakeholder Notification
description: Delivers multi-tier stakeholder notifications based on incident type and severity. Riggs AI classifies the incident and recommends the notification tier. Tier 1 (data breach) triggers notifications to executive leadership, legal counsel, privacy officer, and affected business units via email, plus a Slack alert to the CISO. Tier 2 (operational disruption) notifies IT leadership and affected service owners. Tier 3 (security event) sends a standard SOC notification. Each notification tier creates a tracking ticket in Jira for audit compliance.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify CISO, IT leadership, and SOC team via dedicated Slack channels

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create notification tracking tickets for audit compliance

config.description: Triggers when an incident requires stakeholder notification based on type and severity

config.additional_instructions: Classify this incident into a notification tier. Tier 1: data breach or regulatory impact (notify executives, legal, privacy). Tier 2: operational disruption (notify IT leadership, service owners). Tier 3: standard security event (SOC notification only).
config.description: AI-powered incident classification to determine the appropriate stakeholder notification tier
Check if the incident is classified as Tier 1 requiring executive, legal, and privacy officer notification

notify.message:
TIER 1 INCIDENT NOTIFICATION — POTENTIAL DATA BREACH

Incident: {{trigger_1.alert.title}}
Severity: {{analyze_1.severity}}
Classification: Data Breach / Regulatory Impact

Executive Summary:
{{analyze_1.summary}}

Immediate Actions Required:
- Legal review of notification obligations
- Privacy officer assessment of affected data
- Business unit impact evaluation

A follow-up briefing will be scheduled within 2 hours.

config.description: Send Tier 1 notification to executive leadership, legal counsel, and privacy officer
Send a direct Slack alert to the CISO channel for Tier 1 data breach incidents

config.description: Create a tracking ticket for Tier 1 notification audit trail
Tier 1 data breach notification complete — executives, legal, privacy, and CISO all notified
Check if the incident is classified as Tier 2 requiring IT leadership and service owner notification
Send Tier 2 notification to IT leadership and affected service owners
Post Tier 2 notification to the IT operations Slack channel for coordination
Tier 2 operational disruption notification complete — IT leadership and service owners notified
Post Tier 3 standard security event notification to the SOC operations channel
Tier 3 SOC notification complete — standard security event, no external stakeholders needed
